description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style coupe car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a deep blue color. The vehicle features two doors, classic chrome bumpers at the front and rear, and circular headlights and taillights. The wheels are covered with metallic hubcaps, and the windows are tinted black, giving the car a sleek, retro appearance. The roofline is smoothly curved, typical of mid-20th-century European coupes, and the car has a small, sloped rear trunk. The license plates are visible on both the front and rear, and the overall build suggests a sturdy metal construction with some plastic and rubber components. This coupe car would be commonly seen parked on city streets or driving through urban neighborhoods.
description: A vintage, deep blue two-door coupe car with a rounded body, chrome bumpers, and classic styling. It features metallic hubcaps, tinted windows, and a smoothly curved roofline.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, rounded fenders, and chrome bumper details.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sloped trunk, rear chrome bumper, taillights, and license plate.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with visible door and wheel details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded hood, circular headlights, front chrome bumper, and license plate.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
